falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a reversal of the prior bottom pattern's bearish implications

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a blowoff volume surge would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a potential market climax contrary to the pattern's expected behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its all-time high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major index breaking its previous peak would falsify the pattern's implication of a continuation pattern and prove the 'HOLD' verdict incorrect

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
